title: Ability to delete subitem from form
excerpt: While creating a form today I accidentally added a subitem which is apparently in beta. I realized I couldn’t delete this from within the form view. Even when the subitem is deleted from the board it remains on the form …

posts.author: camernrezk (Cameron Rezk)
posts.cookedHtml: While creating a form today I accidentally added a subitem which is apparently in beta. I realized I couldn’t delete this from within the form view. Even when the subitem is deleted from the board it remains on the form and your only option is to hide it.

posts.author: Ursoutherngrl (Elle Twon)
posts.cookedHtml: Will there ever be a resolution to this? I did the same thing today and it doesnt provide an option to delete the question from even if there was NO entry using that field. I do not simply want to HIDE the question - i want it gone.

posts.author: agermain (Adam Germain)
posts.cookedHtml: I am here to add my support to this topic as I have mistakenly stumbled upon the same issue regarding the ‘subitems’ while messing around with form functionality. Not sure why this can’t simply be deleted or undone, but it is rather annoying!
